texto: I do believe Jesus died so we could feel freed up to go after life to the full, so we would feel equpped to take risks and not beat ourselves up when we fail. He didn't die to make our lives look perfect. He died so we could stop feeling as if our lives have to be perfect for them to mean something.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mandy Steward: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I do believe Jesus died so we could feel freed up to go after life to the full, so we would feel …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, jesus, could pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
